name: MSI Installer Database (Windows Installer)
categoryDescription: Application installation, execution history, compatibility configuration, and OS version information.
description: Windows Installer (MSI) product registration database — records every MSI-installed product with ProductCode GUID, version, and install state.
forensic_value: Alternative to Uninstall key for MSI-based software. Contains install paths and component GUIDs that can identify specific software versions. Useful when Uninstall entries have been deliberately removed (anti-forensic).
